evals.prompt: Build me a client portal where my consulting clients can log in, view their project status, download deliverables, and see invoices.
evals.expected_output: A spec document written to specs/ with clarifying questions asked first, NOT immediate code
expectations: Asks 3-5 clarifying questions before writing any spec
Questions address scope, users, constraints, or integration points
Writes a spec file to specs/ directory (not inline only)
Spec includes prioritized features or MVP scope
Does NOT write any implementation code before getting user approval

evals.prompt: Add a dark mode toggle to my website. It should remember the user's preference.
evals.expected_output: Clarifying questions followed by a spec, with no code until approved
expectations: Gathers project context silently first (reads CLAUDE.md, package.json, etc.)
Asks clarifying questions about the existing tech stack and design system
Writes a spec to specs/dark-mode.md or similar descriptive filename
Spec addresses persistence mechanism (localStorage, cookie, or system preference)
Includes an explicit approval gate - waits for user sign-off before coding
